name: sync-scheduler
description: Suggests Project Review meeting slots by querying Google Calendar through gw and returning deterministic JSON.
capability_summary: Find and recommend available Project Review slots from Google Calendar using the gw tool, with JSON outputs for orchestration.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Target local date in YYYY-MM-DD format for slot suggestions.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of suggested slots to return (default 3).
